  "findings": [
    "Meter jaws are burned and corroded, creating a high-resistance connection and fire hazard."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the service, replace the damaged meter socket/jaws, and inspect the meter base for further thermal damage before re-energizing."
  ],
  "rationale": "Burned and corroded meter jaws violate NEC requirements for equipment to be free from recognized hazards and maintained in a safe condition. This creates a severe fire and safety hazard due to poor electrical contact.",

    "NEC Art. 230",
    "NEC 110.12",

  ]
